Tomorrow is your birthday. TOMORROW. I am trying to stay calm but my heart is absolutely not cooperating ❤️
One day left, my love. I wish I could be there to steal the first hug of your birthday 🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂
አንድ ቀን ብቻ ቀረ!!! የኔ ማር የችን ቀን አብሬሽ ባሳልፍ አጠገብሽ ሆኘ እቅፍ ባደርግሽ እንዴት ደስ እንደሚለኝ
Tonight feels special already, like the whole world is quietly preparing to say your name.
If distance had feelings, it would be embarrassed by how much I still manage to love you through it.
Tomorrow the calendar finally catches up to what I already know every day: you are worth celebrating.
My love, this is your almost-birthday hug: close your eyes for three seconds and pretend I am there. 🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂🫂
